name: Parking Fine Appeal
description: Sender is disputing a parking fine or infringement notice
checks: Is a fine or infringement number referenced?
What grounds are cited? (signage obscured, medical emergency, permit displayed, wrong vehicle, time dispute)
Does the evidence support the claimed grounds?

outcomes.valid_appeal: Evidence supports the appeal, grounds are legitimate
outcomes.needs_evidence: Appeal filed but missing required evidence or fine number
outcomes.needs_review: Complex case requiring human review (conflicting evidence, edge case)
outcomes.rejected: No valid grounds for appeal based on information provided

response_templates.valid_appeal: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. We have reviewed the evidence you provided regarding the violation at {location} on {violation_date}. Your appeal has been forwarded to our Parking Review Panel for assessment. You will receive a written determination within 21 business days.
response_templates.needs_evidence: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. To process your appeal, we require the following additional information: {missing_items}. Please provide this within 14 business days.
response_templates.needs_review: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. Your case has been flagged for detailed review by our Parking Review Panel. A senior officer will contact you within 10 business days.
response_templates.rejected: Thank you for your correspondence regarding infringement notice {fine_number}. After reviewing the details provided, we are unable to identify grounds for waiving this infringement. Payment is due within 28 days.
